name: Internal container has an image vulnerable to CVE-2022-3602 or CVE-2022-3786 (OpenSSL vulnerability)
description: A container is running an image vulnerable to OpenSSL vulnerabilities
conditions: has_openssl_vulnerability == true OR vulnerabilities CONTAINS 'CVE-2022-3602' OR vulnerabilities CONTAINS 'CVE-2022-3786'
remediation: Rebuild container image with OpenSSL 3.0.7 or later.
